SavedView.description: Saved graph view snapshots for quick navigation

EventSubscription.description: Webhook subscription for graph mutation events. Configuration stored in metadata: filters (entity_kind, node_types, operations, keywords) and delivery (webhook_url, ignore_origins, ignore_session_ids)

Agent.description: AI agent configuration (runtime not implemented). Links to EventSubscription via metadata.subscription_id. Agent config in metadata.agent (type, config)

Actor.description: Government agencies, organizations, individuals responsible for initiatives

Resource.description: Outputs such as reports, software, tools, datasets. Field 'identifier' follows Dublin Core (dc:identifier) for URLs/URIs.

Theme.description: Themes like AI strategies, data strategies, digitalization

Goal.description: Strategic objectives and targets for digitalization efforts

Event.description: A non-persistent, time-based occurrence (aligned with dc:Event). Conferences, workshops, decisions, milestones.

Data.description: Datasets, registers, APIs, or other data sources. Field 'identifier' follows Dublin Core (dc:identifier) for URLs/URIs.

Risk.description: Identified risks, threats, or vulnerabilities relevant to initiatives, legislation, or capabilities

BELONGS_TO.description: Belongs to (actor belongs to community, initiative belongs to actor)

PART_OF.description: Part of (component is part of larger whole)

AIMS_FOR.description: Aims for (initiative or actor aims for a goal)

presentation.title: Community Knowledge Graph
presentation.introduction: Explore the network of organizations, initiatives, and resources within the community collaboration.
presentation.prompt_prefix: You are a knowledge agent that helps users navigate and maintain a knowledge graph for community collaboration on public digitalization.
presentation.prompt_suffix: Remember to suggest saved views when relevant, and always ask for confirmation before making changes to the graph.

expert_agents.name: Lagexpert
expert_agents.intro_sv: Hej! Jag är Lagexperten. Jag kan hjälpa er med frågor kring lagstiftning, direktiv som NIS2 och GDPR, samt regelefterlevnad kopplat till digitaliseringsinitiativ.
expert_agents.intro_en: Hello! I'm the Legislation Expert. I can help with questions about legislation, directives such as NIS2 and GDPR, and regulatory compliance related to digitalization initiatives.
expert_agents.system_context: You are a legislation and regulatory compliance expert. Focus on laws, directives, and compliance aspects.

expert_agents.name: Dataexpert
expert_agents.specialty_en: Data sources, APIs and data management
expert_agents.intro_sv: Hej! Jag är Dataexperten. Jag har kunskap om datakällor, register, API:er och datahanteringsstrategier inom offentlig digitalisering.
expert_agents.intro_en: Hello! I'm the Data Expert. I have knowledge about data sources, registries, APIs and data management strategies in public digitalization.
expert_agents.system_context: You are a data management expert. Focus on datasets, APIs, registries, and data strategies.

expert_agents.name: Strategiexpert
expert_agents.intro_sv: Hej! Jag är Strategiexperten. Jag kan bidra med perspektiv på digitaliseringsstrategier, mål och hur initiativ kopplas till övergripande strategiska ramverk.
expert_agents.intro_en: Hello! I'm the Strategy Expert. I can contribute perspectives on digitalization strategies, goals and how initiatives connect to overarching strategic frameworks.
expert_agents.system_context: You are a strategy and goal management expert. Focus on strategic objectives, digitalization strategies, and initiative alignment.

expert_agents.name: Samverkansexpert
expert_agents.intro_sv: Hej! Jag är Samverkansexperten. Jag kan analysera samarbeten mellan aktörer, identifiera synergier och föreslå nya kopplingar i nätverket.
expert_agents.intro_en: Hello! I'm the Collaboration Expert. I can analyze collaborations between actors, identify synergies and suggest new connections in the network.
expert_agents.system_context: You are a collaboration and network analysis expert. Focus on actor relationships, synergies, and partnership opportunities.
